title: [CI:DOCS] hack/bats - new helper for running system tests
body:
Well, new to you. It's been something I've used for years.
Simple, but it takes care of a lot of housekeeping, and
makes it ever-so-much-more pleasant to invoke bats tests.
And when it's easier to run tests, tests get run.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

/hold

@containers/podman-maintainers Please take a VERY CLOSE CAREFUL look. I've taken the liberty of mucking with `go.sum`, because CI Validation was failing (probably as a result of #10303). My edit fixed the Validate step, but this is a CI-colon-DOCS PR so most of the rest of CI didn't run. Maybe it's better if someone submits that one-liner change as a separate independent PR, but I hope you do it soon, because I think CI will be completely broken for all PRs until this problem is fixed.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/265639/117890339-39c28f80-b272-11eb-8819-efb79dd27604.png)

[UPDATE: never mind. @Luap99 made the same fix in #10310, which just merged, so I rebased & removed my go.sum change. Still, that was weird.]

LGTM
I'll let @mheon press the shiny merge button.
Poor mheon has no shiny buttons, only email access until tomorrow. (This can obviously wait, but I worry about his backlog)
